tagline_card.headline: Pro-Level Typography for Canva
tagline_card.content: Transform standard fonts into **layered**, **textured**, and **3D** masterpieces without leaving your canvas.

extrude_preview.headline: Retro Depth
extrude_preview.content: Stackable **3D layers** with offset math for that classic 90s arcade aesthetic.

inflated_preview.headline: Balloon Volume
inflated_preview.content: Computational **puff logic** using inner shadows and specular highlights.
